page: Microsoft Azure NC8as_T4_v3 is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine from the NCASv3_T4 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs powered by an AMD processor, paired with 56.0 GB of system memory, yielding 7.0 GB of RAM per core.

The instance is equipped with a single NVIDIA T4 graphics processing unit featuring 15 GB of dedicated VRAM. For local storage, the server includes 360 GB of temporary storage and supports Premium Storage configurations for high-performance external disk attachments.

This hardware profile is designed for entry-level GPU workloads, including machine learning inference, lightweight deep learning training, and graphics rendering. The combination of dedicated AMD CPU cores, a T4 GPU, and a high memory-to-core ratio provides a cost-effective entry point for accelerated computing without the expense of high-end tensor-core GPUs.
description: Microsoft Azure NC8as_T4_v3 is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine belonging to the NCASv3_T4 family, powered by an AMD processor and virtualized via Microsoft Hyper-V. It features 8 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs, 56.0 GB of system memory (7.0 GB per core), and a single NVIDIA T4 GPU with 15 GB of VRAM. The server also includes 360 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage for demanding disk I/O operations. This configuration provides a balanced, cost-effective platform for workloads that require GPU acceleration alongside substantial system memory, such as machine learning inference, data analytics, and video processing.
og_description: Microsoft Azure NC8as_T4_v3 is an AMD-powered virtual machine featuring 8 dedicated vCPUs, 56 GB of RAM, a 15 GB NVIDIA T4 GPU, and 360 GB of local storage for accelerated workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure NC8as_T4_v3 features 8 dedicated vCPUs, 56 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA T4 GPU with 15 GB VRAM for GPU-accelerated workloads.
tagline: An AMD-powered virtual machine featuring dedicated vCPUs, generous system memory, and an NVIDIA T4 GPU for cost-effective accelerated computing.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs powered by AMD processors
56.0 GB system memory providing 7.0 GB per core
Single NVIDIA T4 GPU with 15 GB of dedicated VRAM
360 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Optimized for machine learning inference and graphics rendering
